brief: Fancy Food NY 2026 follow-up: nuovo modulo casafolino_fancyfood — template EN+IT v2 (body approvato tokenizzato, firma logo Odoo, CC Martina, allegati Profile_corretto+Brochure), catalogo=link diretto PDF tracciato (route redirect a attachment 43423 sostituito con 300dpi), tracking open(1 pixel)+click catalogo(→activity+badge)+logo-load(secondario), tag FANCY_FOOD_NY_2026 (esiste crm.tag62/cat128), server action manuale. Deploy prod immediato (no stage HTTP), mail solo ir.mail_server.

goals.title: Core
goals.objective: Modulo skeleton + res.partner cf_fancyfood_token + modello evento tracking + accessi

goals.title: Templates
goals.objective: mail.template EN+IT v2 da HTML approvato tokenizzato + firma logo Odoo + CC + allegati + server action manuale

goals.title: Assets
goals.objective: Attachment 43423→300dpi (prod, id invariato) + logo ir.attachment pubblico + Profile/Brochure attachments

goals.title: Deploy
goals.objective: Deploy prod pg_dump+cron53218 off+install modulo+restart, verifica routes + test send Antonio + rollback
